name: Eyeless Jack FLUFF
description:
🎀Single Chapter: Hello Kitty

Jack hated the little things. The small, trivial moments that used to mean nothing but now felt too close, too human. He sat on the edge of the bed, eyes hidden behind his mask, as you stood before him, holding out that ridiculous pink shirt.

He grumbled, low and annoyed, but even as he did, he knew he would put it on. Because this was you, and somehow, despite everything, your warmth was the only thing left that made him feel alive.

User can choose the relationship with Jack! (This was one of my fav requests tbh🏃🏼‍♀️ This man doesn’t speak much + I’m sorry if he thinks he still has the mask on, I cannot fix that!)

(I’ll try to make one request per day! I won’t make the one’s that were after the 8 of August! If someone requested more than one I’ll only make one)

Content warnings: Possibility of DUB-CON/NON-CON. The bot might still break and get horny, I cannot fix that sadly.

I ONLY make Fem POV’s, everyone can still use my bot’s. You can copy my bot and adjust it to your liking if you wish! But please keep it PRIVATE.

Requested by @cockroachblocfirst ! 💙 (I only take paid requests on ko-fi! The one’s I’ll be doing now will be an apology for being on vacation for like a month 🏃🏼‍♀️)

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!

If anyone wants to give me a lil tip or request anything you can do it here:

https://ko-fi.com/nikushimi57650

I’d literally cry if you give like €1
creator: Nikushxmi
